allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\danie\\trendify\\trendify-web" -Recurse -Depth 3 | Where-Object { !$_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("D:\\danie\\trendify\\trendify-web\\", ""\) } | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch "node_modules" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing; $html = $resp.Content; @\("Trendify", "Trending Now", "posts analysed", "sunglasses", "garment types", "font-playfair", "COLOUR", "Fit"\) | ForEach-Object { $match = $html.Contains\($_\); "  '$_' found: $match" })

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; $html = $resp.Content; @\("Dresses", "Tops", "Bottoms", "Footwear", "Outerwear", "Accessories", "aria-label=`"Previous image`"", "aria-label=`"Next image`"", "1 type", "types"\) | ForEach-Object { "  '$_': $\($html.Contains\($_\)\)" })
